note: This file is a PROPOSAL only. It does NOT clear any symbol. The operator must invoke shared.broker_repair_required.clear_repair manually with the matching marker path.
proposed_actions: Operator: invoke shared.broker_repair_required.clear_repair('AVAX/USD', marker_path='<absolute path of learning-loop/operator_markers/AVAX_USD_<date>.json>') only after operator review.
Operator: invoke shared.broker_repair_required.clear_repair('ETH/USD', marker_path='<absolute path of learning-loop/operator_markers/ETH_USD_<date>.json>') only after operator review.
Operator: invoke shared.broker_repair_required.clear_repair('LTC/USD', marker_path='<absolute path of learning-loop/operator_markers/LTC_USD_<date>.json>') only after operator review.
